data.description: High risk environment (Risk-Off). Elevated volatility and front-end term structure backwardation signal immediate defensive positioning as stalled geopolitical negotiations and trade frictions outweigh Treasury efforts to ease energy and fertilizer supply constraints. VIX is 27.19. Expensive premiums; favor defensive selling or volatility hedges.
data.global_thesis: Elevated volatility and front-end term structure backwardation signal immediate defensive positioning as stalled geopolitical negotiations and trade frictions outweigh Treasury efforts to ease energy and fertilizer supply constraints.
